title: Uyire Un Uyirena Lyrics Zero Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Uyire un uyirena
naan iruppen.
anbae , inimel
un idhazhinil
naan sirippaen.
englishStanzas:
Uyire un uyirena naan iruppen.

[My soul, I will be your life.]



anbae

[dear]



inimel un idhazhinil naan sirippaen.

[henceforth I will smile with your lips.]



idhamaai un idhayathil kaaththiruppen

[pleasantly, I will wait in your heart.]



kanave

[my dream]



kanavaai un vizhigalil kaaththiruppen

[Like a dream, I will wait in your eyes.]



dhinamae

[everyday,]



mazhayaai en manadhinil nee vilundhaai.

[you fell like a rain in my heart.]



vilundhaal oru vidhaiyena naan ezhundhaen.

[if you fall, I will raise like a seed]



viralukkum idhalukkum pirandhidum isaiyena iruvarum iruppom idamporul marappom

[like a music created between fingers and lips, we will be like that and forget the time.]



unakena enakena mudhal edhu mudivedhu edhuvarai iruppom adhuvarai pirappom

[for you and me, where is the beginning? where is the end? how long we can live? we’ll be together till that time.]



yaar nee yaar naan vaa nee nee naan

[who’re you? who I am? come to me, you and I are same.]



ulagin kadhavai thaazh thirappom uyire mazhalai mozhiyaai magizhindhiruppom.

[let’s open the door of this world. my soul, let's be happy like a child]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Uyire Un Uyirena'?

The song expresses deep love and emotional connection, highlighting the feelings of longing and devotion.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie Zero?

In Zero, the song reflects the protagonist's romantic feelings and the emotional journey he undergoes.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Anirudh and composed by Nivas K Prasanna.

When was 'Uyire Un Uyirena' released?

The song was released on February 23, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Uyire Un Uyirena', the protagonist expresses his profound love and longing for his beloved. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of romance and emotional depth. This track beautifully conveys the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. The song resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and pains of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uyire Un Uyirena is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Anirudh's soulful vocals and Nivas K Prasanna's enchanting composition, this song from the movie Zero resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic as the lyrics weave a tale of devotion and emotional connection.
stanzaMeanings: I will be your life, my dear, from now on I will smile in your eyes.
I am waiting in your heart like a dream.
I am waiting in your eyes like a dream every day.
You have blossomed in my heart like rain.
If you blossom, I have risen like a seed.
I will be your life, my dear.
From now on I will smile in your eyes.
We will be two notes born for each other, forgetting the world around us.
We will be together, no matter what happens, until the end.
Who are you, who am I? Come, you and I.
We will open the door to the world and rejoice like a child with a sweet voice.
I will be your life, my dear.
From now on I will smile in your eyes.
I am waiting in your heart like a dream.
I am waiting in your eyes like a dream every day.
You have blossomed in my heart like rain.
If you blossom, I have risen like a seed.
